title: Indigo Folly w/ Haunting Titans
description: Indigo Folly brings their genre-bending sound to Oasis with support from Haunting Titans. Doors at 8pm, music starts at 9.

title: The Huntress & The Holder of Hands w/ A Former Friend
description: A heavy night at the Oasis. The Huntress & The Holder of Hands headline with A Former Friend opening. 21+.

title: Sea Shanty Night w/ My Druthers & Bards of Gungywamp
description: Sea Shanty Night is back! My Druthers and Bards of Gungywamp bring the rope-pulling sing-alongs. Bring your beer voice.
